```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const EPS = 1e-12;
  const activation = z => z >= -EPS ? 1 : -1; 
  const displayActivation = z => activation(z) === 1 ? 1 : 0;

  const w0 = Inputs.range([-8, 8], { value: 0.5, step: 0.5, label: null });
  const b0 = Inputs.range([-4.5, 4.5], { value: 0, step: 0.5, label: null });
  const xSample = Inputs.range([-1, 1], { value: 2, step: 0.5, label: null });

  const ySample = Inputs.radio([-1, 1], {
    value: 1,
    label: null,
    format: d => `y = ${d}`
  });
  ySample.style.display = "flex";
  ySample.style.gap = "12px";

  const etaInput = Inputs.range([0.1, 1], {
    value: 0.2,
    step: 0.1,
    label: null
  });

  const playBtn = html`<button style="
    padding: 6px 12px;
    border: 1px solid #999;
    border-radius: 6px;
    background: white;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 500;
  ">Play</button>`;

  const status = html`<div style="
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    min-height: 1.2rem;
    color: #444;
    text-align: center;
  "></div>`;

  const currentParams = html`<div style="
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    min-height: 1.2rem;
    color: #444;
    text-align: center;
  "></div>`;

  function compactRow(name, input) {
    input.style.width = "100%";
    input.style.margin = "0";

    return html`<div style="
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1.8rem 1fr;
      align-items: center;
      column-gap: 0.4rem;
      min-width: 180px;
    ">
      <span>${name}</span>
      ${input}
    </div>`;
  }

  const topControls = html`<div style="
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 18px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  "></div>`;

  const playRow = html`<div style="
    display:flex;
    justify-content:center;
    width:100%;
    margin-top:4px;
  "></div>`;
  playRow.append(playBtn);

  topControls.append(
    compactRow("w₀", w0),
    compactRow("b₀", b0),
    compactRow("η", etaInput),
    compactRow("xₛ", xSample),
    html`<div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;"><span>target</span>${ySample}</div>`,
    playRow
  ); 

  const leftHost = html`<div></div>`;
  const rightHost = html`<div></div>`;

  let animationToken = 0;
  let currentState = null;
  let isTraining = false;
  let isTrained = false;

  function setButtonMode(mode, info = "") {
    if (mode === "play") {
      playBtn.textContent = "Play";
    } else if (mode === "training") {
      playBtn.textContent = info ? `Training · ${info}` : "Training";
    } else if (mode === "reset") {
      playBtn.textContent = "Reset";
    }
  }

  function computePath(wInit, bInit, xs, y, eta, maxSteps = 100) {
    const path = [{ w: wInit, b: bInit }];

    let wc = wInit;
    let bc = bInit;

    for (let k = 0; k < maxSteps; k++) {
      const pred = activation(wc * xs + bc);
      if (pred === y) break;

      wc = wc + eta * y * xs;
      bc = bc + eta * y;
      path.push({ w: wc, b: bc });
    }

    return path;
  }

  function getInitialState() {
    return {
      w: Number(w0.value),
      b: Number(b0.value)
    };
  }

  function render(state = null, stepInfo = "", history = []) {
    currentState = state ?? getInitialState();

    const wv = currentState.w;
    const bv = currentState.b;

    const xsVal = Number(xSample.value);
    const ysVal = Number(ySample.value);
    const eta = Number(etaInput.value);

    const xMin = -5, xMax = 5;
    const xs = d3.range(xMin, xMax, 0.05);

    const invalid = wv === 0;
    const x0 = invalid ? null : -bv / wv;
    const x0Clamped = invalid ? null : Math.max(xMin, Math.min(x0, xMax));

    const zSample = wv * xsVal + bv;
    const predSample = activation(zSample);
    const sampleCorrect = predSample === ysVal;

    const boxWidth = (xMax - xMin) * 0.55;

    const c1 = "rgba(186, 228, 179, 0.2)";
    const c0 = "rgba(158, 202, 225, 0.2)";
    const sampleColor = ysVal === 1 ? "#2ca02c" : "#1f77b4";

    const zHistory = history.map((s, i) => ({
      z: s.w * xsVal + s.b,
      y: 0,
      step: i
    }));

    let curveData, axisData, leftColor, rightColor, boundaryMark, titleText;

    if (invalid) {
      const pred = displayActivation(bv);

      curveData = null;
      axisData = xs.map(xi => ({ x: xi, pred }));

      leftColor = pred === 1 ? c1 : c0;
      rightColor = leftColor;

      boundaryMark = null;
      titleText = `No decision boundary`;
    } else {
      curveData = xs.map(xi => ({ x: xi, y: displayActivation(wv * xi + bv) }));
      axisData = xs.map(xi => ({ x: xi, pred: displayActivation(wv * xi + bv) }));

      leftColor = displayActivation(wv * xMin + bv) === 1 ? c1 : c0;
      rightColor = displayActivation(wv * xMax + bv) === 1 ? c1 : c0;

      boundaryMark = Plot.ruleX([x0Clamped], {
        stroke: "black",
        strokeDasharray: "4,4"
      });

      titleText = `Decision boundary at x₀ = ${x0.toFixed(2)}`;
    }

    currentParams.textContent = isTrained
      ? `Trained parameters: w = ${wv.toFixed(2)}, b = ${bv.toFixed(2)}`
      : `Current parameters: w = ${wv.toFixed(2)}, b = ${bv.toFixed(2)}`;

    const xTitle = html`<div style="
      text-align:center;
      font-size:0.95rem;
      margin-bottom:6px;
    ">
      x-space
    </div>`;

    const xPlot = Plot.plot({
      width: 560,
      height: 330,
      x: { label: "x", domain: [xMin, xMax] },
      y: { label: "activation(wx + b)", domain: [-0.05, 1.05] },
      style: { background: "white" },
      marks: [
        Plot.rect([{}], {
          x1: xMin,
          x2: invalid ? xMax : x0Clamped,
          y1: 0,
          y2: 1,
          fill: leftColor
        }),
        !invalid && Plot.rect([{}], {
          x1: x0Clamped,
          x2: xMax,
          y1: 0,
          y2: 1,
          fill: rightColor
        }),
        invalid && Plot.rect(
          [{
            x1: -boxWidth / 2,
            x2: boxWidth / 2,
            y1: 0.28,
            y2: 0.78
          }],
          {
            x1: "x1",
            x2: "x2",
            y1: "y1",
            y2: "y2",
            fill: "white",
            fillOpacity: 0.9,
            stroke: "black",
            strokeWidth: 1
          }
        ),
        !invalid && Plot.line(curveData, {
          x: "x",
          y: "y",
          stroke: "black",
          strokeWidth: 3
        }),
        boundaryMark,
        Plot.dot(axisData, {
          x: "x",
          y: 0,
          fill: d => d.pred === 1 ? "#bae4b3" : "#9ecae1",
          r: 2.5
        }),
        Plot.dot(
          [{ x: xsVal, y: 0 }],
          {
            x: "x",
            y: "y",
            fill: sampleColor,
            stroke: "black",
            strokeWidth: 3,
            r: 9
          }
        ),
        Plot.text(
          [{ x: xsVal, y: 0.12, label: `y=${ysVal}` }],
          {
            x: "x",
            y: "y",
            text: "label",
            textAnchor: "middle",
            fontSize: 12
          }
        ),
        invalid && Plot.text(
          [{
            x: 0,
            y: 0.53,
            label: "No decision boundary :)\nThis is because w = 0\n\nTherefore, we choose based only on b\nIf b >= 0, choose 1, otherwise -1."
          }],
          {
            x: "x",
            y: "y",
            text: "label",
            textAnchor: "middle",
            fontSize: 14,
            fill: "black"
          }
        )
      ].filter(Boolean)
    });

    const zMin = -12, zMax = 12;
    const zTitle = html`<div style="
      text-align:center;
      font-size:0.95rem;
      margin-bottom:6px;
    ">
      z-space
    </div>`;

    const zPlot = Plot.plot({
      width: 560,
      height: 330,
      x: { label: "z = wx + b", domain: [zMin, zMax] },
      y: { domain: [-0.05, 1.05], axis: null },
      style: { background: "white" },
      marks: [
        Plot.rect([{}], {
          x1: zMin,
          x2: 0,
          y1: 0,
          y2: 1,
          fill: c0
        }),
        Plot.rect([{}], {
          x1: 0,
          x2: zMax,
          y1: 0,
          y2: 1,
          fill: c1
        }),
        Plot.ruleX([0], {
          stroke: "black",
          strokeDasharray: "4,4"
        }),
        history.length > 1 && Plot.dot(
          zHistory.slice(0, -1),
          {
            x: "z",
            y: "y",
            fill: sampleColor,
            fillOpacity: 0.25,
            stroke: "none",
            r: 5
          }
        ),
        history.length > 1 && Plot.line(
          zHistory,
          {
            x: "z",
            y: "y",
            stroke: sampleColor,
            strokeOpacity: 0.35,
            strokeDasharray: "3,3"
          }
        ),
        Plot.dot(
          [{ z: zSample, y: 0 }],
          {
            x: "z",
            y: "y",
            fill: sampleColor,
            stroke: "black",
            strokeWidth: 3,
            r: 10
          }
        ),
        Plot.text(
          [{ z: zSample, y: 0.12, label: `z=${zSample.toFixed(2)}` }],
          {
            x: "z",
            y: "y",
            text: "label",
            textAnchor: "middle",
            fontSize: 12
          }
        ),
        Plot.text(
          [{ z: -6, y: 0.92, label: "ŷ = -1" }, { z: 6, y: 0.92, label: "ŷ = 1" }],
          {
            x: "z",
            y: "y",
            text: "label",
            textAnchor: "middle",
            fontSize: 12
          }
        )
      ].filter(Boolean)
    });

    leftHost.replaceChildren(
      html`<div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center;"></div>`
    );
    leftHost.firstChild.append(zTitle, zPlot);

    rightHost.replaceChildren(
      html`<div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center;"></div>`
    );
    rightHost.firstChild.append(xTitle, xPlot);

    status.textContent = sampleCorrect
      ? "Sample is correctly classified."
      : `Sample is misclassified.`;
  }

  async function train() {
    animationToken += 1;
    const token = animationToken;

    isTraining = true;
    isTrained = false;
    setButtonMode("training");

    const init = getInitialState();

    const path = computePath(
      init.w,
      init.b,
      Number(xSample.value),
      Number(ySample.value),
      Number(etaInput.value)
    );

    if (path.length === 1) {
      isTraining = false;
      isTrained = false;
      setButtonMode("play");
      render(path[0], "already classified", path);
      return;
    }

    for (let i = 0; i < path.length; i++) {
      if (token !== animationToken) return;
      currentState = path[i];
      setButtonMode("training", `step ${i}/${path.length - 1}`);
      render(currentState, "", path.slice(0, i + 1));
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 700));
    }

    isTraining = false;
    isTrained = true;
    setButtonMode("reset");
    status.textContent = "Converged for this single sample.";
    render(currentState, "", path);
  }

  function resetToInitial() {
    animationToken += 1;
    currentState = null;
    isTraining = false;
    isTrained = false;
    setButtonMode("play");
    render();
  }

  function rerenderFromControls() {
    animationToken += 1;
    currentState = null;
    isTraining = false;
    isTrained = false;
    setButtonMode("play");
    render();
  }

  w0.addEventListener("input", rerenderFromControls);
  b0.addEventListener("input", rerenderFromControls);
  xSample.addEventListener("input", rerenderFromControls);
  ySample.addEventListener("input", rerenderFromControls);
  etaInput.addEventListener("input", rerenderFromControls);

  playBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
    if (isTraining) return;
    if (isTrained) {
      resetToInitial();
    } else {
      train();
    }
  });

  setButtonMode("play");
  render();

  const plotsRow = html`<div style="
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 14px;
    flex-wrap: nowrap;
  "></div>`;

  plotsRow.append(leftHost, rightHost);

  const wrapper = html`<div style="
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 8px;
    margin: 1rem 0;
  "></div>`;

  wrapper.append(topControls, status, currentParams, plotsRow);

  return wrapper;
}
```
